title: Op_tools
description: A Minecraft mod that gives you op tools and armor that almost makes you a god.
body: A Minecraft mod that gives you op tools and armor that almost makes you a god Adds a new ore, blocks, armor, and tools Op_ore can be found below 0 that you smelt into op_ingot that can be crafted into, for example, op_sword, op_pickaxe, or op_armour recipes in the included guidebook For example, the sword deals 1002 attack damage, the armor has 5 knockback resistances, and all tools have 10,000 in durability. Tools are immune to fire. If you get any issues, please report them to the [Issues page](https://github.com/Game-mods-studio/op_tools/issues) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- **You may freely use this mod in any Modpack** So long as you provide attribution to Gamemodstudios ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
